content.en:
The fall of Qianyuan True Monarch and a group of half-step True Ancestors was just the beginning, and in the following time, a large number of half-step True Ancestors fell, and almost none of them could compete with Mo En, the chief official disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect.

Soon, the other half-step True Ancestors all knew that there was a very powerful abyss monster in the Imperial Beast Sect who was slaughtering the half-step True Ancestors.

Ye Tian naturally also knew.

"Qianyuan Zhenjun is actually dead!"

Ye Tian was also quite surprised.

He had also heard of Qianyuan Zhenjun, after all, he was a half-step true ancestor of Daoshan, one of the four transcendent forces, and his strength was very strong, even much stronger than his senior brother Longhai Zhenjun.

Such a powerful half-step true ancestor actually died at the hands of a disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect, and he didn't even have a chance to escape, which showed the strength of that disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect.

In a flash, another half a month passed.

In the past half a month, a large number of half-step True Ancestors have fallen, even exceeding the number of 10,000, which is more than the half-step True Ancestors who have fallen before!

And almost all of these half-step true monarchs fell into the hands of Morn.

For a while, many half-step True Ancestors didn't even dare to show their faces, but hidden, at least until they had the strength to deal with Mo En, they didn't dare to face the Imperial Beast Sect.

this day.

Ye Tian was digging for rare ores in a mountain range full of rare mineral veins, when he suddenly received a distress summons from Longhai Zhenjun.

"Senior Brother Long Hai is in danger!"

Ye Tian was taken aback.

From the summons, it was learned that the Longhai True Monarch and several half-step True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Temple, plus the half-step True Ancestors of other forces, had encountered Mo En of the Imperial Beast Sect.

At present, they are in the process of fleeing with all their might, and one by one they have fallen.

Swish!

Ye Tian quickly moved and rushed over to rescue Longhai Zhenjun.

Through the positioning of Longhai Zhenjun, he roughly determined the location of Longhai Zhenjun, and rushed over as quickly as possible.

"I'm not very far away from Senior Brother Long Hai, and with my speed, it won't be long before I can rush over. As long as Senior Brother Long Hai's life-saving means are strong enough, he should be able to hold out until I pass!"

Ye Tian estimated.

But if there is really no way to rush over in time, then he has no choice but to help Senior Brother Long Hai take revenge.

Time passed by second, and every second that passed, a half-step True Ancestor fell.

A half-step True Ancestor died, and in the end, only Longhai Zhenjun was left.

But at this moment, Longhai Zhenjun has no backhand power at all, and can only rely on life-saving things to persevere.

----------

On top of a forest, Longhai Zhenjun used the spatial treasure to move here, but soon Morn descended here and completely annihilated this forest with a single blow.

Long Hai Zhenjun was also pierced, and his body fell into the ruins of the forest.

Rounds of attacks bombarded me, and I don't know how many times I annihilated Longhai Zhenjun, but Longhai Zhenjun relied on a life-saving strange thing, the Tears of the Sea of Life, to recover his body again and again.

However, this is almost the last life-saving thing, and the power of the Tears of the Sea of Life is also rapidly depleting, and it can't last long at all.

"Little junior brother, senior brother, I'm afraid I'm really going to fall this time!"

Long Hai Zhenjun thought helplessly.

He lost hope and was ready to give up.

Just then, the void cracked, and an arm reached out, stopping Morn's attack with a single blow.

Then, a figure appeared beside Longhai Zhenjun, and it was Ye Tian who had just rushed over!

"Senior Brother Long Hai, are you okay?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Little junior brother, if you come a few seconds late, I'm afraid I really won't be able to hold on!"

Long Hai Zhenjun breathed a sigh of relief and said.

When Mo En saw Ye Tian coming, he didn't care, and was ready to kill Ye Tian as well.

Although Ye Tian had just blocked his blow, he didn't use all his strength, he just hit it casually.

"Origin Divine Power - Abyss Tear Claw!"

Morn grabbed it with a single claw, and the abyssal tearing claws containing terrifying power descended with the rules that tore everything apart.

This claw almost showed Morn's terrifying strength, and was able to fully unleash the power of the abyssal monster.

Ordinary abyssal monsters have no intelligence and can't create origin supernatural powers at all, and Morn's talent is too high, so he created abyssal origin supernatural powers such as Abyss Tearing Claws.

If it is divided according to the grade, the Abyss Tear Claw is enough to rank among the top-grade Origin Divine Powers, and it is also the top-grade Origin Divine Powers, which is not weaker than Ye Tian's latest perfect Yin and Yang Polar Knife and Earthquake Sky at all!

Long Hai Zhenjun looked at the abyss tearing claw that descended, and his heart was suddenly shocked.

If Mo En had used this trick before, he would not have been able to hold on to Ye Tian's arrival at all.

"Can the little junior brother stop it?"

Long Hai Zhenjun asked himself.

"Shake the sky!"

Ye Tian lightly, and the power of the sky-shaking directly shattered the abyss tearing claw.

Then, Ye Tian slashed at Mo En with a knife.

Shout!

The Yin and Yang Pole Blade of the Origin Divine Power tore through the space and slashed towards Morn.

But Mo En had a deep understanding of the Space Dao, and he actually sensed the strangeness of the Yin and Yang Pole Knife in advance, and escaped from that position first, but his speed was still a little slower, and a layer of skin was cut off.

"It's terrifying, it's able to break through my skin!"

Morn was shocked.

He was very confident in his defense, those half-step true ancestors couldn't break his defense with a combined blow, and because of this, he was not afraid of those half-step true ancestors, no matter how many of them could threaten him.

But Ye Tian only struck a blow, and didn't hit him head-on, just rubbed his body and slashed over, but he was also able to cut through his skin, this kind of power was terrifying!

Suddenly, Ye Tian slashed at Mo En with a long knife in his hand, and quickly collided with Mo En with a blow.

Bang!!!!

Morn's body flew upside down, and there were signs of cracking in his body.

He's hurt!

"How is it possible, how can a half-step true ancestor have such terrifying power! he is just an ordinary race, and I am an abyss monster, how can he break the shackles and have such terrifying physical strength!"

Morn incredulous.

Escape!

He didn't want to fight anymore, he only fought with Ye Tian twice, and he could already see that Ye Tian's strength was above him.

He was very sorry for his life, even if he had hope of defeating Ye Tian, he would not really fight with such a genius, what if he fell?

He has a great future, and he is even expected to become a supreme Dao Ancestor in the future, so there is no need to risk the crisis of life and death.

Shout!

Mo En tore through the space and fled, Ye Tian told Long Hai Zhenjun to leave, so he chased and killed Mo En.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian and Mo En disappeared.

------------

Ten minutes later.

Morn roared angrily: "Your strength is stronger than mine, but it is impossible to kill me, why do you keep chasing me? You are wasting your time! Abyss monsters are difficult to kill, unless you are far superior to me, you have no hope of killing me!"

"If that's the case, I won't hide my strength!"

Ye Tian responded lightly.

"Sky Splitting!"

Ye Tian blasted away with a blow with his hand.

I saw that the void where Morn was cracking open, and Morn's body was also suddenly cracked.

A terrifying force spread to Morn's body and soul, completely injuring him.

"It's ...... Daoshu !!"

Morn grew terrified.

This is not an Origin Divine Power, but a Dao Technique!

Half-step True Ancestor can perform Dao techniques, what is this concept?

Moreover, Ye Tian's Dao technique was obviously a great achievement or even a consummation realm. The power is terrifying!

"You...... Have you ever entered the Ancestral Pool of Talent?"

Morn thought of the possibility.

Talent Ancestral Pool, that is the place he once dreamed of wanting to enter, but he is not qualified to enter, and there is not even a place in the Imperial Beast Sect.

In an instant, he was jealous and crazy, and he wanted to kill Ye Tian.

But he ran even more frantically!

Ye Tian, who had performed the Sky Splitting Technique, was hit hard with just one blow, this is the power of the Dao Technique!

He had to flee or he would surely die!

Ye Tian was a little sorry that he didn't kill Mo En with one blow, the reason why he didn't use the Dao technique before was because he didn't want to expose it in front of Longhai Zhenjun, but now there are only the two of them here, so even if he casts the Dao technique, he won't expose anything.

As long as you kill Morn, no one will know that he knows how to do Taoism!
